cinema.name: Cinema A
cinema.description: Welcome to the Hermetic International Film Festival 2026!
cinema.instructions:
INSTRUCTIONS

Desktop

• Mouse to look around | [Esc] to release

• [W][A][S][D] or [←][↑][↓][→] to move

• Point on a poster to watch Movie

Mobile

• Drag to look around

• Touch the on-screen to move

• Point on a poster to watch Movie

works.title: A Telephone for God
works.description:
Breathe in to receive. Exhale in a sharp burst through the nostrils to send. Quartz is the medium—amplifier, transducer, archive. Inspired by the research of Marcel Vogel—IBM senior research chemist turned spiritual scientist—A Telephone for God oscillates between past and present, tuning into frequencies of human–plant communication and energetic healing.
The film follows Drew Tousley, one of the few crystal cutters personally trained by Vogel before his passing in 1991, as he creates a four-sided Vogel crystal modeled after the Kabbalistic Tree of Life. Alongside him, energy healer and Reiki master Carly Tousley reflects on the use of crystals in healing. Award-winning artist Merik Goma stars as Vogel’s present-day assistant.

works.title: Against the Waning Light
works.description:
Resonating deep in the abyss, slowly turning, endlessly entangled. It senses us punch and dream. Cloud and stone tune to its ancient song. A song that we have long forgotton. 
This film takes a less Human-centric view of existence, it is without words and attempts to communicate through sound and light reflected. It is shot using only natural light. Our attention is focused on and through a sole female Freediver, as she is drawn deeper and deeper into the fathomless ocean. She experiences something vast and ancient that sets her on a journey through landscapes untouched by human hands.

works.title: Archaic
works.description: As Sam struggles with recent trauma, she is unexpectedly contacted by her old friend Emily, a self-proclaimed neo-shaman. Emily offers a healing ceremony using an underground entheogen, but the timing feels too coincidental, hinting at a hidden agenda tied to their unresolved past.

works.title: By The Fire
works.description: By the Fire is the story of a spiritual awakening that leads a man to quit his day job and pursue a life with meaning. A meditative film about remembrance that moves across the elements —earth, water, air, and fire— revealing the invisible fabric that connects all things. As layers of identity fall away, what remains is the quiet work of the heart: the return to love, to presence, to the spark that still glows beneath the ashes.

works.title: Contact: The Astral Realm
works.description:
"Contact: The Astral Realm" takes its audience on an extraordinary journey into a higher plane of existence, featuring remarkable encounters with ascended masters, spirits, and extraterrestrial intelligences. This pioneering documentary explores the wisdom of influential mystics and visionaries - from Rabi'a Al Adawiyya and Saint Teresa of Avila to Edgar Cayce - who transformed humanity's understanding of consciousness and reality. Through compelling personal accounts, it reveals time-tested techniques for accessing expanded states of awareness, from ancient meditation practices, soul travel, and sacred vision quests to modern CE-5 protocols.
“Contact: The Astral Realm” bridges science and mysticism, offering practical insights into consciousness exploration while honoring the profound mysteries that lie at the heart of these extraordinary human experiences.

works.title: Death....
works.artist: Tertan Calin Vasile, Tertan Smaranda Corina
works.description:
Death....a full stop or just a comma? A film that will change the perception of death.
Testimonies of 10 common people who had a Near Death Experience and the opinion of doctors and specialists in thanatology.

works.title: Dreamwalker
works.description: Dreamwalker is a sci-fi drama about a shaman who embarks on a quest to save his village from certain extinction. Through an altered state of consciousness, he connects with the mind of a scientist from another time who is conducting research to save her civilization. The film delves into the structure of reality, exploring how time and space can be traversed, ultimately intertwining the destinies of the two protagonists.

works.title: Hermetic Film Festival
works.description: We want to celebrate the visions - cinematography and Hermetica are both terrific imaginatively visionary cultures. Contemporary esotericism is intimately, and increasingly, connected with popular culture and new media: for this reason, we want to support such a visual fascination, the storylines revolving around neglected knowledge and the frantic search for the divine upon hidden paths of spirituality.

works.title: Holy Mountain Gallery
works.description: The Holy Mountain Gallery is the official venue partner of the Hermetic International Film Festival. “The Holy” is currently developing an Infinite Virtual Museum and a global Map of Artists. Check it out for exhibitions and more.

works.title: Sacrisoft
works.description: Sacrisoft is the official technical partner of the Hermetic International Film Festival and developed this virtual cinema. The company creates a wide range of innovative independent software, including a Landing Page Creator for your next film project, a Video Art Remix Machine, and an awesome Movie Poster Maker. These tools will be available worldwide soon, so stay tuned.

works.title: Gifigo
works.description: Gifigo is the official media partner of the Hermetic International Film Festival, publishing festival reviews and fresh insights on tech, culture, and society on the go.

works.title: Lucid Lake Institute
works.description: The Lucid Lake Institute is the official research partner of the Hermetic International Film Festival and is dedicated to the study of Western Esotericism and Quantum Philosophy.

works.title: Hermetic Film Festival
works.description: We want to celebrate the visions - cinematography and Hermetica are both terrific imaginatively visionary cultures. Contemporary esotericism is intimately, and increasingly, connected with popular culture and new media: for this reason, we want to support such a visual fascination, the storylines revolving around neglected knowledge and the frantic search for the divine upon hidden paths of spirituality.

works.title: Fairy Tale
works.description: After breaking ground for his new home Heath finds a mysterious looking artifact buried deep in the Earth as he’s digging up his outhouse. Bringing it back to his friend and roommate Kyle the two men realize with the help of their esoteric expert Mary that this artifact isn’t just a relic from the past, but something more sinister. Repressed memories start to seep through Heath’s mind, the mirrors no longer look right, and both the men keep noticing something in the distance watching…Will the two men be able to undo the curse put in motion? In Fairy Tale nothing is quite as it seems.

works.title: Gnosis
works.description: Struggling with deep guilt and depression over ending a long term relationship, a young man hopes to find solace at a friend's home in the desert.

works.title: Goddamn it!
works.description: Too lazy to create the Universe on his own, God gathers his Archangels in his workshop for a brainstorming session. He presents them with the Equation of Everything, and together they debate—often heatedly—the cosmos, the cycle of life, grass, celebrity, religion, poetry, chickens, and night vision with zoom function.
